_doc: Baseline for the foundryx:latest runtime image size regression guard (issue #286). The acceptance criterion in infra/docker/Dockerfile:23-25 ('docker images foundryx:latest reports a smaller byte count') was a one-time manual check from #116; this file + tests/infra/test_docker_build.py convert it into an enforced CI ceiling. To legitimately grow the image: rebuild locally, read `docker image inspect foundryx:latest --format '{{.Size}}'`, update baseline_bytes below to the new size, and commit in the same PR. The test fails loudly otherwise, naming this file.
recorded_from: docker build -f infra/docker/Dockerfile on x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu; python:3.11-slim (digest-pinned), uv 0.9.30, uv sync --frozen --no-dev
human_readable: 138 MiB (144733128 bytes); ceiling at 15% margin = 166443098 bytes (~159 MiB)
